nasb.text: As He was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew were questioning Him privately,

esv.text: And as he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,

cnv.text: 耶穌在橄欖山上，面對聖殿坐著，彼得、雅各、約翰和安得烈私下問他：

ccb.text: 耶稣面向圣殿坐在橄榄山上，彼得、雅各、约翰和安得烈私下来问祂：

csbs.text: 耶稣在橄榄山上，面对圣殿坐着。彼得、雅各、约翰和安得烈悄悄地问他：
